errors.nameExists: An app with this name already exists.
errors.categoryNotFound: The selected category does not exist.

name.minLength: App name must be at least 2 characters.
name.maxLength: App name must not exceed 64 characters.
name.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

displayName.minLength: Display name must be at least 2 characters.
displayName.maxLength: Display name must not exceed 80 characters.

iconUrl.invalid: Icon URL must start with http:// or https://.

homeUrl.invalid: Home URL must start with http:// or https://.

status.invalid: Status must be active or inactive.

requiredRoles.required: Select at least one required role.

redirectUris.required: Add at least one redirect URI.
redirectUris.invalid: Each redirect URI must start with http:// or https://.

body.empty: Provide at least one field to update.
